w:r.w:t: Next.js · TypeScript · Tailwind · Firebase · OpenAI · Recharts
Software Engineer · Doctor · IAS Officer · CA · MBA Manager

FuturePath AI is an AI-powered, immersive career simulation platform designed for middle and high school students (Class 7–10). Rather than passively reading about professions, students actively explore careers through interactive simulations, decision-making scenarios, an AI mentor chatbot, and a personalised recommendation engine.

The platform currently covers five career tracks: Software Engineer, Doctor, IAS Officer, Chartered Accountant (CA), and MBA Manager. Each track includes an overview page, daily workflow simulation, skill requirements, career roadmap, salary trends, and future opportunities.

Students in India face a critical career decision at Class 10 when choosing a stream (Science, Commerce, Humanities). Most have minimal first-hand exposure to what different professions actually look like day-to-day. This leads to misaligned choices, dropped streams, and general career confusion.
FuturePath AI fills this gap by letting students simulate real job scenarios, interact with an AI mentor, and receive data-driven career recommendations — all before they commit to a stream.
Let students explore and simulate 5 real career tracks interactively
Provide AI-powered mentorship via an OpenAI-backed chatbot
Generate personalised career recommendations from simulation performance
Display analytics and skill comparisons on a personal dashboard
Deliver a polished, mobile-responsive experience suitable for portfolio and deployment
Main frontend framework — routing, SSR, API routes, scalability
Type safety, cleaner codebase, professional standard
NoSQL database — user data, scores, progress, recommendations
Optional — user engagement and career popularity tracking
AI mentor chatbot and career guidance
Data visualisation — bar, pie, radar, compatibility charts
The platform follows a four-layer architecture:
User lands on homepage → browses career cards
Selects a career → reads overview, roadmap, salary data
Enters simulation → scenario presented → makes decisions → score recorded
Recommendation engine reads scores → suggests best-fit career
AI mentor accessible at any stage via chat overlay
Dashboard aggregates all Firestore data into charts and badges
→ Firebase Auth triggers Google OAuth popup
→ On success: user UID, email, displayName saved to Firestore /users/{uid}
→ Session persists via Firebase local persistence
Student types question in ChatInterface component
→ API route calls OpenAI with system prompt + user message
→ Message appended to local chat history
Overview — what the profession is, why it matters
Daily workflow — a typical day in this job
Required skills — technical and soft skills
Salary trends — entry / mid / senior with bar chart
roadmap: { stage: string; duration: string; description: string }[]
overview: "Software engineers design, build, and maintain...",
{ stage: "Class 11–12", duration: "2 years", description: "PCM with CS" },
{ stage: "B.Tech / BCA", duration: "4 years", description: "Core CS degree" },
futureScope: "AI, cloud, SaaS are booming. Demand is extremely high.",
workLifeBalance: "Moderate. Startups demand more; big tech is balanced."
// doctor, ias-officer, chartered-accountant, mba-manager follow same structure
Overview: CAs are financial experts who handle audits, taxation, and corporate finance. One of the most respected professions in India.
Roadmap: Class 12 Commerce → CA Foundation → CA Intermediate → CA Final (ICAI)
Key Skills: Accounting, Taxation (GST/Income Tax), Auditing, Financial Reporting, Tally/ERP
Typical Day: Client meetings, tax filings, audit reviews, financial statement preparation
Scope: Every company needs a CA. High demand in Big 4 firms, banks, and entrepreneurship.
Overview: MBA graduates work in management consulting, marketing, finance, HR, and operations across industries.
Roadmap: Any graduation → CAT/GMAT/XAT → IIM/Top B-School → MBA (2 years)
Key Skills: Leadership, Strategy, Data-driven decisions, Communication, Negotiation
Typical Day: Team meetings, strategy presentations, vendor calls, P&L reviews
Salary: Fresher ₹8–12L · Mid ₹20–35L · Senior ₹60L+ (IIM grads can start at ₹25–30L)
Scope: Cross-industry applicability. Tech, FMCG, consulting, banking all hire MBAs.
The simulation engine is the most important module — the core differentiator of FuturePath AI. It lets students experience real-life job scenarios through interactive decision-making.
Step 1: Student selects "Try Simulation" on any career page
e.g. "Your CA client has missed GST filing deadline. What do you do?"
Step 4: System evaluates choice against correct answer
Step 5: Feedback shown (ResultModal) — explanation of why it was right/wrong
Step 7: Next scenario loads — 5-8 scenarios per career
Step 8: Final score saved to Firestore if logged in
decisions: { id: string; text: string; isCorrect: boolean; explanation: string }[]
situation: "A client insists on recording a personal expense as a business cost.",
{ id: "a", text: "Record it to keep the client happy", isCorrect: false,
explanation: "This violates GAAP and is illegal." },
{ id: "b", text: "Refuse and explain the legal risk", isCorrect: true,
explanation: "A CA must maintain professional integrity." },
{ id: "c", text: "Ask a senior colleague", isCorrect: false,
explanation: "You have the knowledge — act on it." },
Traits tracked: analytical, creativity, leadership, ethics, communication
Scores stored per career in Firestore at /users/{uid}/scores/{career}
The recommendation engine analyses simulation performance and maps results to career fit using rule-based logic. This can be upgraded to ML in a future version.
export function getRecommendation(scores: Record<string, number>): string {
const { analytical, creativity, leadership, ethics } = scores

The AI mentor allows students to have open-ended conversations about any career. It is context-aware — knowing which career the student is currently viewing — and gives personalised, encouraging responses suited for Class 7–10 students.
const openai = new OpenAI({ apiKey: process.env.OPENAI_API_KEY })
const system = `You are FuturePath, a friendly and knowledgeable career mentor
for students in Class 7–10. The student is currently exploring the career: ${career}.
Give honest, encouraging, age-appropriate career advice. Keep answers under 150 words.
Mention India-specific context (UPSC, CA exams, IITs, CAT) where relevant.`
export default function ChatInterface({ career }: { career: string }) {
<span className="inline-block px-4 py-2 rounded-xl bg-indigo-100 text-sm">
className="flex-1 border rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm"
placeholder="Ask me anything about this career..." />
className="bg-indigo-600 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm">
import { onAuthStateChanged, signInWithPopup, signOut, User } from "firebase/auth"
interface Props { scenario: Scenario; onDecision: (id: string) => void }
export default function ScenarioCard({ scenario, onDecision }: Props) {
<motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-8 shadow-lg border border-gray-100">
<span className="text-xs font-medium text-indigo-600 bg-indigo-50 px-3 py-1 rounded-full">
className="w-full text-left px-5 py-4 rounded-xl border border-gray-200
export default function CareerCard({ career }: { career: Career }) {
className="block bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 border border-gray-100 shadow-sm
<div className="w-12 h-12 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center mb-4"
import { Radar, RadarChart, PolarGrid, PolarAngleAxis, ResponsiveContainer } from "recharts"
interface Props { traits: { subject: string; score: number }[] }
export default function SkillRadar({ traits }: Props) {
npx create-next-app, GitHub repo, Tailwind config, dependency install
Full folder scaffold: app/, components/, data/, lib/, hooks/, types/
Hero section, animated career card grid, Navbar, Footer, CTA buttons
5 career pages with all sections + dynamic [slug] routing
Scenario engine: ScenarioCard, DecisionButton, ResultModal, ProgressTracker
Rule-based engine: score thresholds → career recommendations
Google OAuth via Firebase, useAuth hook, protected dashboard route
DashboardCard, badge system, explored careers list, Firestore reads
Tailwind breakpoints: sm, md, lg — mobile-first approach
Framer Motion animations, hover effects, loading states, glow accents
QA all 5 careers, simulations, auth flow, chatbot, responsive
GitHub → Vercel, env vars configured, live URL
README, screenshots, Loom demo video, LinkedIn post
Push code to GitHub: git push origin main
Go to vercel.com → "New Project" → Import from GitHub
Add all .env.local variables in Vercel Environment Variables panel
Click Deploy → wait ~2 minutes → live URL ready
Enable Google Authentication in Auth → Sign-in method
Create Firestore database in production mode
allow read, write: if request.auth != null && request.auth.uid == userId;
ML-based recommendation (replace rule-based with a trained model)
Add 5+ more careers: Data Scientist, Lawyer, Architect, Filmmaker, Entrepreneur
Multiplayer simulations — teams of students compete on same scenario
Teacher dashboard — class-wide analytics and progress monitoring
PWA support — offline mode and mobile app installation
Voice mentor — text-to-speech AI mentor responses
Leaderboards — weekly top performers per career track
Video walkthroughs embedded inside career pages
npm install firebase openai framer-motion recharts lucide-react
FuturePath AI · PRD v2.0 · 5 Career Tracks including CA and MBA
